code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业IoT宠物洗衣机控制器设计一个完整的状态机。核心流程是：Idle → Washing → WashComplete → Drying → DryComplete → Folding → CycleComplete → 回到Idle。每个阶段都要考虑MQTT broker的通信和状态持久化。
明白了。Washing和Drying这两个阶段内部结构应该类似吧？都需要定时器、剩余时间计算、状态保存这些子状态？另外，我看到有IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController、IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic、IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream这些不同的控制器，它们怎么分配？
对，结构对称但控制器不同。Washing阶段用ActuatorController做主控，PLC_Logic处理完成后的清理；Drying阶段换成TelemetryStream做主控，ActuatorController处理完成逻辑。这样能测试不同工业协议栈的切换。每个TimerRunning子状态都要有SaveState和UpdateUI的循环，数据存UserDefaults。

好的，我先画出Washing的主结构：Idle通过"Start Wash Button"进入Washing，内部有TimerRunning和TimerComplete两个子状态。TimerRunning里面放SaveState和UpdateUI的循环，TimerComplete走CancelTimer → ClearState → SendNotification，最后回到ActuatorController。
TimerRunning到CalculateRemaining的触发条件是"Every 0.5s"，这个要标清楚。还有，remaining 0时回到TimerRunning，remaining ≤ 0才进入TimerComplete。
已调整。现在画Drying阶段：WashComplete通过"Start Dry Button"进入，内部是TimerRunning2和TimerComplete2，结构一样但控制器换成TelemetryStream和ActuatorController。SaveState2的UserDefaults里type要改成.dry。
DryComplete之后是Folding，这个状态比较特殊，宠物主人需要手动点击"完成折叠"才能进入CycleComplete。CycleComplete里面要做完整的健康更新：health=100、state=.happy、更新lastLaundryDate和cyclesCompleted，还有streak。最后用EdgeNode做SaveDatabase。
CycleComplete的子状态顺序确认一下：UpdatePetHealth → UpdateStats → ClearNotifications → SaveDatabase → 回到ActuatorController？另外Folding到CycleComplete的触发条件是"User Taps Fold"？
对，顺序没错。但Folding的触发条件我想改成"Ready to Fold State"更贴切，表示系统通知用户现在可以折叠了，用户点击后才完成。
好的，已改为"Ready to Fold State"。现在处理应用恢复场景：如果用户在Washing或Drying时杀掉App重开，需要RecoveryCheck状态来恢复。这个用MQTT broker做主控，加载UserDefaults后验证状态合理性。
RecoveryCheck的验证逻辑要详细一点：检查endTime是否存在、是否合理、不能太远未来也不能太久过去。验证通过后CalculateActualRemaining，然后根据实际剩余时间决定是回到Washing/Drying继续，还是跳到WashComplete/DryComplete，或者数据损坏就回Idle。
RecoveryCheck画好了，四个出口都连上了。现在加健康衰减系统：Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete这三个状态都可能因为"Time Passes"进入HealthDecay，由ActuatorController检查上次洗衣时间，计算当前健康值。
健康计算公式是：daysSince / expectedCycleFrequency，health = 100 * (1 - ratio)。状态映射要完整：100-75% Happy，75-50% Neutral，50-25% Sad，25-1% Very Sad，0%就是Dead。健康更新后回到Idle，但如果health=0就进入Dead状态。
HealthDecay结构完成了，UpdateState之后回到MQTT broker。Dead状态指向PLC_Logic，标注"Pet Dies"。现在加几个注释说明：Idle状态标注无活动定时器、健康持续衰减；WashComplete和DryComplete也加上状态说明。
注释内容没问题。但我注意到Washing和Drying的入口条件：Idle到Washing是"Pet Created"还是"Start Wash Button"？看流程应该是先有Pet Created建立连接，然后用户点击开始。
啊，我之前把入口标错了。修正：初始状态应该是[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]通过"Pet Created"进入Idle，然后Idle通过"Start Wash Button"进入Washing。这样更符合实际启动流程。
对了，SaveState和SaveState2的UserDefaults注释要区分清楚：wash类型存endTime、.wash、petID；dry类型存endTime、.dry、petID。CycleComplete里的UpdatePetHealth注释也要完整列出所有更新字段。
所有注释都补全了。再确认几个细节：Washing到WashComplete的触发是"Timer Expires"，Drying到DryComplete也是"Timer Expires"，CycleComplete到Idle没有特殊标注？另外HealthDecay的UpdateState之后直接到MQTT broker，不需要再经过什么中间状态？
CycleComplete到Idle不需要标注，自然流转就行。HealthDecay的UpdateState直接回MQTT broker是对的，表示状态同步完成。整体结构应该完整了，再检查一下所有MQTT broker、PLC Logic、TelemetryStream、EdgeNode、ActuatorController的分配有没有遗漏。

全部检查完毕：Washing主控是ActuatorController，TimerComplete用PLC Logic；Drying主控换成TelemetryStream，TimerComplete2用ActuatorController；RecoveryCheck用MQTT broker；CycleComplete用EdgeNode；HealthDecay用ActuatorController。所有状态转换和注释都已对齐。
完美。这个状态机覆盖了正常洗涤流程、应用恢复、健康衰减和死亡机制，还测试了三种不同的工业控制器切换。可以定稿了。
